description_long: This washing machine features a boxy, modern design with a teal blue body and a prominent orange circular door on the front. The front panel includes a control interface with buttons, a dial, and a small display, all situated above the door. The top lid is hinged and can be opened, revealing an interior compartment, while both sides display a large orange lightning bolt graphic. The back is plain with visible hinges for the top lid. The materials appear to be primarily metal or coated steel, with plastic components for the door and control panel, and a glass or plastic window in the door. The overall appearance is robust and functional, suitable for urban or residential environments.
description: A teal blue, box-shaped washing machine with an orange circular front door, control panel, and bold lightning bolt graphics on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the teal body, orange lightning bolt graphic, and the open top lid.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the orange circular door, control panel with buttons and dial, and the open top lid.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a matching orange lightning bolt graphic and the open top lid.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain teal surface with visible hinges for the top lid.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the upper front face, featuring a small digital display, several buttons, and a rotary dial, all arranged horizontally above the door.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular door made of orange plastic with a visible handle integrated into the rim.
